sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n83583" key="platumh/lh" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πλᾰτῠ-μήλη</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n83583.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">broad probe,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antyll.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:44:22:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">44.22.2</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heliod.</author> </bibl> ap. eund. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg-181.tlg001:44:11:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">44.11.2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
